Source   Edit  

Research Cost Calculation

Calculate RP costs and PP conversion per economy.md:4.0

Cost formulas:

  • ERP: (5 + log(GHO)) PP per ERP
  • SRP: Similar scaling
  • TRP: Varies by tech field
Economic Research Points (economy.md:4.2)Science Research Points (economy.md:4.3)Technology Research Points (economy.md:4.4)Research Allocation

Imports

types, ../../common/types/tech

Procs

proc allocateResearch(allocation: ResearchAllocation; gho: int; slLevel: int): ResearchPoints {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Convert PP allocations to RP

Args: allocation: PP allocated to each category gho: Gross House Output (for RP conversion) slLevel: Science Level (affects TRP costs)

Source   Edit   
proc calculateERPCost(gho: int): float {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate PP cost per ERP Formula: 1 ERP = (5 + log(GHO)) PP Source   Edit   
proc calculateSRPCost(currentSL: int): float {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate PP cost per SRP Formula per economy.md:4.3: 1 SRP = 2 + SL(0.5) PP Source   Edit   
proc calculateTotalRPInvested(allocation: ResearchAllocation): int {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate total RP invested (for breakthrough calculation) Source   Edit

Convert PP to ERP Source   Edit

Convert PP to SRP Source   Edit   
proc convertPPToTRP(pp: int; techField: TechField; slLevel: int; gho: int): int {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Convert PP to TRP for specific tech field Source   Edit   
proc getELModifier(level: int): float {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get EL economic modifier (as multiplier) Per economy.md:4.2: +5% per level, capped at 50% Returns 1.0 + bonus (e.g., 1.05 for EL1, 1.50 for EL10+) Source   Edit   
proc getELUpgradeCost(currentLevel: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}

Get ERP cost to advance Economic Level Per economy.md:4.2

EL1-5: 40 + EL(10) EL6+: 90 + 15 per level above 5

Source   Edit   
proc getSLModifier(level: int): float {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Get SL research modifier Affects TRP costs

TODO: Define proper SL effects

Source   Edit   
proc getSLUpgradeCost(currentLevel: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}

Get SRP cost to advance Science Level Per economy.md:4.3

SL1-5: 20 + SL(5) SL6+: Increases by 10 per level

Source   Edit   
proc getTechUpgradeCost(techField: TechField; currentLevel: int): int {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Get TRP cost to advance tech level Per economy.md:4.4-4.12 (varies by field)

TODO: Load field-specific costs from specs Placeholder: Exponential scaling

Source   Edit   
proc getTRPCost(techField: TechField; slLevel: int; gho: int): float {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Get PP cost per TRP for specific tech field Formula per economy.md:4.4: 1 TRP = (5 + 4(SL))/10 + log(GHO) * 0.5 PP

Args: techField: The technology being researched slLevel: Current Science Level gho: Gross House Output

Source   Edit

ResearchAllocation
